landing.badge: Host a site or deploy an app
landing.subheadline: From your files or repo to a live site or app — in minutes.

cookies.message: We use cookies to keep Flowstas working and, with your consent, to understand usage.

seo.title: Flowstas — Publish your website in seconds
seo.description: Paste HTML or drop a zip and your site is live — its own address, HTTPS, a contact form, and your own custom domain.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Publish your first site free — no credit card needed. Upgrade when you need more, cancel anytime.
pricing.inc1: A free site to start — no card needed
pricing.inc2: Connect your own domain, with HTTPS included
pricing.faqSubtitle: The honest answers before you pick a plan.
pricing.q1: Is there really a free plan?
pricing.a1: Yes. You can publish 1 site for free, with no credit card required. Start building and go live, then upgrade only if you need more.
pricing.a2: Yes. Plans are month-to-month with no contracts — cancel any time from your billing page and you keep access until the period ends.
pricing.q3: What if I hit my plan limit?
pricing.a3: Your live sites and apps keep running. To add more, just upgrade to a higher plan — nothing already published goes offline.

about.subtitle: We are a small UK product that makes it simple to publish a website and host your apps, without the usual setup or jargon.
about.story1: Flowstas is a new, independent product built in the UK. It started from a simple frustration: getting a website online or running a small app shouldn’t mean wrestling with servers, build configs, and DNS for a whole weekend.
about.story2: So we set out to build something more direct. Paste in your site or connect a repo, choose a name, and publish, with HTTPS handled for you. No agency, no complicated setup.
about.story3: We’re early, and we’re building Flowstas in the open. The roadmap is shaped by the people who use it, and we’d rather grow carefully and earn your trust than overpromise. If you try it, we’d genuinely love your feedback.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do.
about.v1d: Everything we build starts with understanding our customers’ needs and challenges.
about.v2d: We believe powerful tools should be easy to use. No complexity, no confusion.
about.v3d: We hold ourselves to the highest standards in everything we do.
about.v4d: We constantly push boundaries to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

contact.subtitle: Have a question or need help? We’d love to hear from you. Our team is ready to assist.
contact.sentBody: We’ve received your message and will get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.phMessage: Tell us more about your question...
contact.toastError: Could not send your message. Please try again.
contact.toastSuccess: Message sent! We’ll get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.infoSubtitle: Reach out through any of these channels and we’ll respond as soon as possible.

publishPage.errNeedHtml: Add some HTML for your site first — or click "Use a sample site".
publishPage.errNeedImportUrl: Paste the address of the site you want to import first.
publishPage.errNeedRepo: Paste the link to your GitHub repo first.
publishPage.errNeedFiles: Drop, choose a folder, or pick a .zip of your website first.
publishPage.errDropFailed: Could not read what you dropped — try the folder or .zip picker instead.
publishPage.errNeedDomain: Enter the domain you own first, e.g. www.yourbusiness.com.
publishPage.ownDomainTitle: Put it on your own domain
publishPage.domainConnected: {domain} is connected — now point it to us:
publishPage.dnsCname: At your domain provider, add a CNAME record from {domain} to {target}.
publishPage.dnsARecord: For a root domain (no "www"), add an A record to {record} instead.
publishPage.secureGoLive: Your secure address ({domain}) goes live automatically once it points to us — usually within an hour.
publishPage.alreadyOwnDomain: Already own a domain? Connect it so visitors see yourbusiness.com instead of the preview link.
publishPage.title: Publish a website
publishPage.subtitle: Put your site online in one click. Its contact form captures every message straight to your dashboard.
publishPage.siteNamePlaceholderRepo: Leave blank to use the repo name
publishPage.githubHelp1: We pull the repo and publish its files as-is. Best for static sites (HTML, CSS, JS) — we don't run a build step. Add
publishPage.githubHelp2: to the link for a specific branch.
publishPage.templatesIntro: No files? Pick a starting point — we'll drop it into the editor so you can change the words and publish.
publishPage.siteNamePlaceholderSite: Leave blank to use the site's name
publishPage.importHelp: We snapshot the page and serve it as your site. Its images and styles keep loading from the original address.
publishPage.uploadIntro1: Upload your whole site — HTML, CSS, images and all. Drag the folder straight in, or use the pickers. We serve
publishPage.dropHere: Drag & drop your website folder here

deployPage.errNeedRepo: Paste the link to your app's Git repo first.
deployPage.errBuildFailed: The build failed — open the build logs to see what happened.
deployPage.title: Deploy your app
deployPage.subtitle1: Point us at your GitHub repo — we build it and put it live on the internet. Just a simple website?
deployPage.repoHelp: GitHub, GitLab or Bitbucket. We auto-detect your framework — Next.js, Astro, SvelteKit, Nuxt, Vite/React, plain Node, a static site, or your own Dockerfile.
deployPage.tokenHelp: A read-only token. Used once to fetch your code — never stored.
deployPage.liveSubtitle: It's running on the internet right now.
deployPage.manageApp: Manage app — add secrets, a custom domain & more

successPage.title: Payment Successful!
successPage.description: Thank you for your subscription. You will receive a confirmation email shortly with your account details and next steps.

cancelPage.title: Payment Cancelled
cancelPage.description: Your payment was cancelled and no charges were made. If you have any questions or encountered an issue, our support team is here to help.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, payment information, and any other information you choose to provide.
privacyPage.s2Body: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send you technical notices and support messages, and respond to your comments and questions.
privacyPage.s3Body: We take reasonable measures to help protect your personal information from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access. All payment information is processed securely through Stripe.
privacyPage.s4Body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@flowstas.com.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Body: By accessing or using Flowstas services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
termsPage.s2Body: Flowstas offers subscription-based services. By subscribing, you agree to pay the applicable fees and authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis until you cancel.
termsPage.s3Body: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Upon cancellation, you will continue to have access to the service until the end of your current billing period.
termsPage.s4Body: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for new subscribers. If you are not satisfied with our service, contact us within 14 days of your first payment for a full refund.
termsPage.s5Body: For any questions regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@flowstas.com.
